violations.text: Dumplings were observed held at 117-125 degrees Fahrenheit in a hot hold unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. reheated to 165 deg F and adjusted steam table (added water). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Disposed of plastic pint containers and replaced with scoops with handles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025
